policy_name.description: Unique identifier for the policy; matches fil_governance_policies.policy_name.

event_type.description: Governance event type this policy triggers.

scope_type.description: Whether the policy applies globally or to a single product.

scope_id.description: Product ID when scope_type is 'product'; null for global.

threshold_value.description: Numeric threshold — USD for cost policies, call count for loop detection.

window_seconds.description: Time window in seconds for rate-based policies. Null for single-event policies.

action.description: Response action: alert/warn write a governance event; block escalates to critical severity.

active.description: Whether this policy is enforced. Inactive policies are retained for audit history.

notes.description: Human-readable explanation of the policy's purpose.
